programme.title: Have Gun, Will Travel
programme.desc: When his tailor is killed in an accident at a supposedly worthless gold mine, Paladin discovers that the man was murdered and his heirs are being swindled.

programme.title: Wanted Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Randall is rooked out of his bounty by crafty criminal Hunt Willis and his accomplice. Not one to accept defeat, Josh turns detective to rout the outlaws, his investigation dogged by the suspicious sheriff, a cousin to Willis.

programme.title: The Three Stooges
programme.sub-title: Playing The Ponies, Flatfoot Stooges, Snitch In Time, Up In Daisy's Penthouse, A Bird In The Head, Dizzy Detectives
programme.desc: "A horse is a Stooges, of course, of course. , Moe, Larry and Curly take care of the horses. , The Stooges are carpenters who become policemen. A mysterious burglar disguised as a gorilla has the cops baffled and Mr. Dill, the head of the citizens league, threatening the police chief's job. The boys go on the case and pose as night watchmen at an antiques store. They confront the crook, who turns out to be a real gorilla owned by Dill. After defeating Dill and some other bad guys in a wild fight, the gorilla drinks some nitroglycerin and blows up. , The Stooges are carpenters who are re-staining some furniture they've delivered to a boarding house. The plot gets complicated when the boys confront some crooks who are hiding out there. They defeat the bad guys with the help of the varnished furniture, which sticks the head crook to a chair. , The Stooges escape from jail to prevent their newly rich dad from marrying Daisy, a gold-digger after his money. Shemp looks like dad, so he impersonates him and marries Daisy. What the Stooges don't know is that Daisy is in cahoots with some crooks, and they plan to bump off her new husband. The boys foil the crook's plan and take Pa home to Ma. , The maniacal masters of madcap are back, digitally remastered, repackaged and hilarious as ever. "

programme.title: House of Svengoolie
programme.desc: "A teenager helps three aliens enter the dating scene in the 1980s."

programme.title: Batman
programme.sub-title: He Meets His Match, The Grisly Ghoul
programme.desc: Batman and Robin track a female student who joined Joker's gang, but Joker poisons her perfume to cover his tracks.

programme.title: Star Trek
programme.desc: The Enterprise picks up intergalactic conman Harry Mudd and three incredibly beautiful women hiding a dark secret.

programme.title: Adventures of Superman
programme.desc: When Jimmy inherits millions overnight, he becomes the target of swindlers.

programme.title: Adventures of Superman
programme.desc: Clarl Kent pretends to join a gang of diamond thieves in an undercover scheme.

programme.title: Lost in Space
programme.desc: Penny "imagines" a new companion, which is a disembodied life force living below the surface. Dr Smith accidentally injures Penny leading to the creature taking his anger out on the entire planet.

programme.title: Voyage to the Bottom of the Sea
programme.desc: In a race to keep a ship carrying the president out of danger, Nelson and Crane battle a whale that has swallowed an atomic bomb.

programme.title: Land of the Giants
programme.desc: Inspector Kobick forces the Earthlings to help him deal with a ring of counterfeiters by holding some of their number hostage.

programme.title: The Time Tunnel
programme.desc: In an Iron Curtain country, Tony and Doug pose as scientists to investigate a primitive enemy time-tunnel in 1956.

programme.title: The Invaders
programme.desc: Vincent's friend stands trial for an invader who vaporized.

programme.title: The Life and Times of Grizzly Adams
programme.desc: "A widower and his son move into a nearby valley and refuse friendly advice from Adams and Nakoma, with disastrous consequences."

programme.title: Mutual of Omaha's Wild Kingdom
programme.desc: "Marlin visits the Grand Teton Mountains in the U.S. and the wilderness north of Canada to show us the territorial fight, the rescue of a baby moose and to see the sandhill cranes."

programme.title: Mutual of Omaha's Wild Kingdom
programme.desc: "Marlin and Jim make a fascinating climb up the Philmont Trail with a troop of Explorer Scouts at the famous Boy Scout ranch near Cimarron in northern New Mexico."

programme.title: Mutual of Omaha's Wild Kingdom
programme.sub-title: Spotted Ghost Of The Desert Part I
programme.desc: "In the Kalahari region of southern Africa, Marlin Perkins and Jim Fowler study the life and habits of the graceful and cunning leopard by establishing a camp near a hidden leopard den."

programme.title: Mutual of Omaha's Wild Kingdom
programme.sub-title: Spotted Ghost Of The Desert Part Ii
programme.desc: "Marlin and Jim continue their investigation into the home life of the leopard."

programme.title: Mutual of Omaha's Wild Kingdom
programme.desc: "A valley in the mountain country of the western United States is the territory of the Golden Eagle, America’s largest and most powerful bird of prey. Marlin and Jim locate an eyrie (nest) of this magnificent bird, and build a blind high on a rocky cliff so they can photograph its nesting habits. Humor and drama are interwoven as the young eagle, in his search for food, follows a skunk into his den…and later finds out that a fast dive at a sitting duck results in his first unwanted bath. His territory is invaded by a forest fire, and the hunting is made easier as the other animals of the valley flee the flames. He is trapped by man in a scientific experiment, but later released to continue his life in the “Valley of Eagles.”"

programme.title: Mutual of Omaha's Wild Kingdom
programme.sub-title: In Search Of A Giant Armadillo
programme.desc: "Marlin and Stan journey to Guyana, South America in search of one of the world’s rarest wild animals, the giant armadillo."

programme.title: The Brady Bunch
programme.desc: Greg, wanting to make a record, books a recording studio and plans on singing a song with his siblings. However, when Peter's voice begins to change, his hopes of recording are dashed. That is until Greg gets a new idea that just may accommodate Peter's changing voice.

programme.title: The Brady Bunch
programme.desc: Jan discovers her Aunt Jenny looked exactly like her when she was young. She wants a current picture of her aunt to see how she might look in the future, and she's troubled by her discovery.

programme.title: Happy Days
programme.sub-title: The Not Making Of The President
programme.desc: Richie goes against Howard and, to get a girl, campaigns for Adlai Stevenson in the 1956 Presidential race.

programme.title: Laverne & Shirley
programme.desc: The gang works to raise money for Frank's annual hobo Christmas dinner.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Andy becomes suspicious when a record promoter comes to town to gather material for a folk music album.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy and Ethel demand equal rights for women. Okay, say Ricky and Fred at the restaurant: separate checks for the four of them. Thus begins Lucy and Ethel's careers as restaurant dishwashers. So they plot revenge: they'll scare their husbands by claiming to have been robbed.

programme.title: Leave It to Beaver
programme.desc: June's birthday has Wally and Beaver fighting over what to buy with the $5 dollars that Ward gave them. Wally buys her a wallet while Beaver buys an ugly blouse that June kindly thanks him for, but she has a hard time bringing herself to wear it.

programme.title: Leave It to Beaver
programme.desc: Beaver wants to raise chinchillas and begins building a cage in the garage. However, when Beaver changes his mind, Ward tries his best to get Wally and Beaver to clean up the mess. Things get worse when Ward unknowingly runs over some of the wood and nails left laying around with the car, causing the boys to try to patch a flat tire before Ward finds out.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jethro gets a date with the Drydales’ new maid, Linda, but she is only interested in the fact that he has a color television set. Instead of paying attention to Jethro, she watches a football game the first night and an ice hockey game the next. Jethro attempts trying out the games, but isn’t very successful at football and doesn’t like the hockey gear.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Shorty Kellems heads to Hollywood after selling his hotel, silver mine, house and land. Besides the thousand he has for that, he also has two hundred big ones, since the bills are bigger than the ones Jed has. Drysdale is told Shorty's “big” money makes Jed's look like nothing. Drysdale thinks Shorty has $200 million and is desperate to get his money in the bank. He promises Shorty a wild Hollywood party if he deposits the money. Drysdale comes through with the "orgy," and Shorty decides to put his money in the bank.

programme.title: Gilligan's Island
programme.desc: Gilligan has the winning ticket for a South American sweepstakes.

programme.title: Gilligan's Island
programme.desc: The Professor thinks that the island is sinking, which causes the castaways to panic.

programme.title: Mama's Family
programme.sub-title: Mama And The Big Wheel (s5, ep)
programme.desc: When Iola buys a lottery ticket with Mama's change at the store, Mama doesn't care enough to keep the ticket—until Iola wins a chance to spin the lottery wheel for $2 million.

programme.title: Mama's Family
programme.desc: When Mama refuses to pay the electric bill she is disputing, the electric company turns the power off—and the timing couldn't be worse.

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.sub-title: Farnsworth's Fling / Three In A Bed / I Remember Helen / Merrill, Melanie & Melanesia / Gopher Farnsworth Smith (part 1) (s5, ep)
programme.desc: The crew is in Australia to work on one of the cruise lines ships based there. And a wealthy man named Fransworth has decided to invite his whole family for a reunion. But in actuality he wants to see who among them he should keep in his will.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Barney's overzealous policing enrages the people of Mayberry.

programme.title: Collector's Call
programme.sub-title: Kirk Kirkand- Classic Scifi Tv Props

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: With the camp facing prohibition and a severe medical supply shortage during another heat wave, Hawkeye resolves to lift morale by importing a racy new movie.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: When an Olympic runner assigned to the 4077th fails to materialize, Father Mulcahy must save the camp's honor in a high-stakes footrace against the 8063rd.

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: Gloria comes home from work one evening in a total apathetic mood. When Archie tries to find out what's wrong with her, she snaps at him and storms off. Later, Edith gets to the bottom of Gloria's mood when she confides in Edith that she thinks that she has temporarily fallen out of love with Mike (something that Edith confesses happened to her and her feelings for Archie). Meanwhile, Archie and Mike prepare for a fishing trip.

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: Archie stops by Jefferson Cleaners to pick up some dry cleaning and pays with a twenty dollar bill. Later, a furious George shows up at the Bunker's front door claiming the bill Archie passed to him was counterfeit. This leads to two separate arguments: one between Archie and George and the other between Edith and Louise. Louise and Edith quickly make up and soon put a plan into motion that would clear up the entire mess between George and Archie.

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: Mike's graduation day is coming up fast and Mike is a nervous wreck as he studies for his exams. Surprisingly, Archie begins acting nicely to Mike, since Archie has high hopes that once Mike graduates, he will finally move out of the house and begin repaying Archie the room and board that he owes him. However, as Mike's test results come in, Archie's in for a shock as Mike is offered a fellowship to get his masters degree thus, the Stivics are going to live for one more year with the Bunkers.

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: Lionel has a fight with his parents and moves into the Bunker's house for a night.

programme.title: The Carol Burnett Show
programme.sub-title: Guests Lucille Ball And Mel Torme
programme.desc: "Guests Lucille Ball and Mel Torme. Originally aired on 10/19/70."

programme.title: The Carol Burnett Show
programme.desc: "Guest Jim Nabors. Originally aired on 09/22/69."

programme.title: The Dick Van Dyke Show
programme.sub-title: The Curse Of The Petrie People
programme.desc: Laura is given and accidentally destroys a hideous brooch that tells the story of the Petrie family. Will she be able to reconstruct the pin before her mother-in-law's next visit?

programme.title: The Dick Van Dyke Show
programme.sub-title: The Bottom Of Mel Cooley's Heart
programme.desc: Rob's parents give Laura a Petrie family heirloom: a hideous brooch.

programme.title: The Honeymooners
programme.desc: Ralph cuts a record to sweet talk Alice after insulting her mother.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A scientist uses time travel in the attempt to prevent past tragedies, both in world history and in his own life.

programme.title: Alfred Hitchcock Presents
programme.desc: "A handsome homicide detective is befriended by four old ladies who invite him for tea and proceed to play out a variation of Arsenic and Old Lace for his benefit."

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: After completing a mission, Paris is undercover as an American businessman and still in disguise when he is kidnapped by Latin American revolutionaries led by terrorist Robert Siomney. They ask for the release of three prisoners in return for Paris' life.

programme.title: The Fugitive
programme.desc: On the run from Gerard, Kimble stumbles onto private property belonging to a family of moonshiners. When Gerard gives chase on foot, he too is caught by the backwoods family, and is accused of attacking one of the girls in the family. Kimble has to decide

programme.title: Harry O
programme.desc: "After Spence Johnson's elderly father, who had complained of medical neglect and improper care in a nursing home, dies Spence hires his friend Harry O to help prove he was killed by negligence."

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Friday and Gannon are on a mission to bolster community relations when a young and slightly militant black man barricades himself in his apartment rather than submit to a traffic warrant.

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Friday and Gannon appear on a TV panel. The topic: "The Police—Who Needs Them?"

programme.title: Adam-12
programme.desc: Reed naively thinks the system can help a young serial car thief who continually skirts responsibility for his actions with the help of his rich father's lawyer. In the meantime, he and Malloy help a woman track down the drug dealer responsible for her boyfriend's fatal overdose, and pull over a stubborn elderly woman.

programme.title: Adam-12
programme.desc: Malloy needs to sell two tickets to the ballet after his date cancels, but he quickly regrets putting a notice on the station's bulletin board. While patrolling the harbor and surrounding area, he and Reed investigate a marine fuel dealer accused of forgery, pull over a driver with a suspicious box on the roof of his car, question a suspicious young couple, deal with an astrologer who is driving recklessly and encounter a drunken cook shooting a rifle from the crow's nest of a docked ship.

programme.title: Toon In With Me
programme.desc: "Bill enters an air guitar competition."

programme.title: Leave It to Beaver
programme.desc: While Beaver is staying at the Mondellos, Larry sneaks a peak at his sister's diary and his mother discovers him and yells at him right in front of Beaver. This prompts Larry to run away to Beaver's house, where Beaver secretly hides him in his bathroom.

programme.title: Leave It to Beaver
programme.desc: A pet fair at school has Beaver feeling left out because he doesn't have a pet, but he tells everyone he does, a parrot. Meanwhile, Ward tries to find a pet for Beaver and buys him a hamster.

programme.title: Perry Mason
programme.sub-title: The Case Of The Positive Negative
programme.desc: A respected retired general is blackmailed into declining an offer to clean up the city of San Carlos, which is being tarnished by the operations of mobster George Emory. When Emory turns up dead, the general is the prime suspect.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: When radio disk jockey, and Michelle's new boyfriend, Arthur Saxon is accused of murdering a rival, Matlock agrees to defend him. Michelle swears he's the kindest, most gentle man she's ever known, but Matlock soon learns otherwise.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: Tragic story of an alcoholic teen who accidentally kills a little girl while she is drinking and driving.

programme.title: The Waltons
programme.desc: The Waltons find out Sheriff Ep is a decorated war hero and John-Boy wants to write about it.

programme.title: Gunsmoke
programme.desc: Nina Sharky hatches a plan to get away from her tight-fisted father and fortune-hunting husband.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: Two men whom Ben once worked with during a gold claim arrive in Virigina City on opposite sides of the law. Naturally, Ben is caught in the middle.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: An ex-convict is blamed for a brutal crime despite his claims of rehabilitation.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas is out for vengeance when Mark is used as a pawn in a bank robbery scheme.

programme.title: Wagon Train
programme.desc: Out of meat and low on food, the wagon train must not kill any wildlife or all will face the wrath of local indians. The one holdout is Jonas Murdoch, who has always lived outside the rules and doesn't consider a rabbit an issue.

programme.title: Emergency!
programme.desc: A young OD victim is brought into the ER. A man fakes back pain to get a free ride to the hospital. John gets peeved at all the frivolous calls the squad goes on while real emergency victims need help. A man is shocked after kicking in his TV screen. The ambulance carrying the paramedics and a heart attack victim is involved in a traffic accident.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.sub-title: U.n., The Night And The Music
programme.desc: A United Nations delegation tours the 4077th—a Swede, a Hindu and a British officer— and each leaves a lasting effect on the men and women of the camp.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: The 4077th faces a sleepless night as Charles's snoring keeps B.J. and Hawkeye from counting sheep. Meanwhile, Colonel Potter discovers that his son-in-law, Bob Wilson, has had an affair.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: A military strategist refuses to accept responsibility for the war games that have mortally wounded his own son. And Margaret develops laryngitis, as she is about to meet her hero, Dr. Chesler.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: Potter must deal with an old Army friend who is getting his own soldiers killed through his incompetency.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: An infamous con artist, held temporarily in Mayberry, manages to enchant everyone except Andy.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Andy tries to help Barney express his lovestruck feelings for Thelma Lou.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Elly and Jethro both want a gorilla to help out around the house, so Jed asks Drysdale to get them one. Drysdale hires a man dressed as a gorilla to scare the Clampetts, but it fails. They put their new gorilla, Herby, to work doing chores and dress him in old clothes. Mr. Kelly, the man in the gorilla suit, wants out of the deal and gives his suit to Drysdale.

programme.title: The Honeymooners
programme.desc: Ralph hurts his back at a bowling tournament the night before his physical exam.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: The Italian officer who studied under Klink helps Hogan photograph an air base.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: Hogan's men plan to surprise him for his birthday by blowing up an ammunition dump.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: After selling the rope for a hanging, a conscienceless peddler tries to sell the condemned man's father a bag of "magic dust."

programme.title: Perry Mason
programme.sub-title: The Case Of The Lover's Leap
programme.desc: "The victim of a swindle finds his troubles multiplying when he's accused of murder."

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Friday and Gannon appear on a TV panel. The topic: "The Police—Who Needs Them?"

programme.title: Alfred Hitchcock Presents
programme.desc: "Walter Richmond is a gullible tennis player with a nose for snooping. He meets a woman named Laura Gild and tries to learn everything about her. His curiosity does not pay off when she and her supposedly dead husband scam him for money."

programme.title: Alfred Hitchcock Presents
programme.desc: A small-time crook cooks up a scheme for getting rich quick.

programme.title: Mannix
programme.desc: A young woman is kidnapped, drugged and interrogated, her father an ex-spy for the Soviets during the Cold War. A defector now in America, the man hires Mannix to find his daughter in this case of international espionage.

programme.title: Cannon
programme.desc: Frank struggles to prove his friend did not commit murder, but someone (the real killer) is working equally hard to thwart him.

programme.title: Barnaby Jones
programme.desc: A friend dupes Betty into caring for her son while she secretly tries to straighten out her life of crime.

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Cases: an abandoned baby; a teenager on drugs.

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Friday grapples with the Uncle Tom syndrome in selling ethnic groups on police careers.

programme.title: Adam-12
programme.desc: Malloy and Reed are on the lookout for an elusive purse snatcher whose latest victim was visiting her husband's grave. In the meantime, they deal with an annoying former cop turned security guard, encounter a desperate old man attempting to break into a car, help a cantankerous elderly woman who is being evicted, mediate a near-violent dispute over five dollars, track down a runaway baby carriage and search for an armed suspect who just robbed a cocktail lounge.

programme.title: Adam-12
programme.desc: Malloy, Reed and Sgt. MacDonald go horseback as part of the search for suspects responsible for a break-in at a large ranch. Meanwhile, Sgt. MacDonald offers a reward for the return of his favorite boots, Officer Wells starts a collection for a couple who claims their baby needs brain surgery and the station is attacked by a sniper.

programme.title: Toon In With Me
programme.desc: "Bill teaches Toony about the classic children's TV we watched in our youth, from Kukla to Captain Kangaroo."

programme.title: Leave It to Beaver
programme.desc: An upcoming test in history, Wally's weakest subject, has Wally studying all weekend and has Larry and Eddie coming up with a plan that will give them good grades on the test.

programme.title: Leave It to Beaver
programme.desc: Ward allows Beaver to check out a book on his library card but when Beaver loses the book he becomes convinced that Ward will be put in jail, thanks to Eddie Haskell's wiseguy comments.

programme.title: Perry Mason
programme.sub-title: The Case Of The Crafty Kidnapper
programme.desc: After Alex Tanner and his wife, Patricia, inherent her father's global media empire, things get messy when an obnoxious newspaper man is found dead and the couple's toddler is kidnapped.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: When Police Officer Jim Shanley is found dead, Sergeant Jerry Reese is charged with the crime. Everyone thinks he's guilty, especially Shanley's partner. In defending Reese, Matlock begins to realize that an old cop buddy of his isn't the man he used to be.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: A sniper fells a girl involved in an interracial romance.

programme.title: The Waltons
programme.desc: John-Boy won the right to accompany news reporters to a news event - the Hindenburg

programme.title: Gunsmoke
programme.desc: Billy Cathcart tries to find a woman for his big brother because family custom dictates that the oldest marries first.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: Former miner Abner Willoughby returns to Virginia City in search of money he buried somewhere in the area years ago.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas shoots a horse thief who turns out to be a member of the Boyle clan, and now Ma Boyle is after him.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Seven condemned murderers escape and take over the town of North Fork.

programme.title: Wagon Train
programme.desc: After an argument with Major Adams, Flint leaves the wagon train and cozies up to a bar at a nearby town. What he doesn't know is the locals are shanghaiing strangers for slave labor in a mine and no one on the train knows where he went.

programme.title: Emergency!
programme.desc: Johnny and Roy answer a pre-dawn call at a small grocery store for a man down, bleeding. Searching the back of the store, Johnny is confronted with a Bengal tiger. A big brush fire threatens a suburban canyon area with lots of domesticated animals and things get dicey all around for the fire department and the Animal Control guys. Rampart becomes a veterinary surgical center for a while.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: A wounded GI learns a painful lesson when he forms a recovery room friendship with the enemy soldier he's critically wounded.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: Margaret and Hawkeye work on a time capsule to commemorate their time in Korea; Rizzo and B.J. goof around with a fake hand grenade; Klinger becomes smitten with a young, pretty Korean war criminal.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: "At the 4077th Mobile Army Surgical Hospital (M.A.S.H) unit in Korea, two army doctors by the names of Hawkeye Pierce and Trapper John McIntyre receive some exciting news in the mail. Their Korean house boy, Ho-John got accepted into Hawkeye's old college. Hawkeye and Trapper decide to hold a party filled with music, dancing, and alcohol to raise money for Ho-John's plane trip to the U.S. They achieve this by raffling off a weekend pass with a nurse, Lieutenant Dish for R&R in Tokyo."

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: After black marketers hijack the 4077th's supply of hydrocortisone, Hawkeye and Trapper concoct a deal with local black marketer, Charlie Lee, to get some more. The catch: Henry's antique oak desk, which they must trade in order to get the medicine.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Andy and Opie go to great lengths to show Aunt Bee what a mess they'd be without her.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: When a handsome new doctor arrives in town, his friendship with Ellie arouses suspicion in Aunt Bee and Barney and jealousy in Andy.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: After the Clampetts don’t have success with the gorilla they took out of the zoo, they decide to get Herby back. They contact Drysdale who tells Mr. Kelly, but he refuses to do it. Mr. Kelly tells Drysdale he’ll return on his own terms and has Drysdale buy him designer clothes and expensive food. Herby returns to the mansion and starts living the life of luxury, dancing and dining with Elly by the pool.

programme.title: The Honeymooners
programme.desc: Alice is baby-sitting to pay for a phone but Ralph thinks she's two-timing him.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: Hogan robs a bank to help pay for a map to German rocket installations.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: Hogan steals a Luftwaffe codebook, but must organize a special mission when Newkirk drops it down a well.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: While discussing time travel among friends in 1961, a man suddenly finds himself in 1865—on the date of Lincoln's assassination.

programme.title: Perry Mason
programme.sub-title: The Case Of The Elusive Element
programme.desc: A promoter's plan to frame his wife and business partner for embezzlement fails, but they're arrested anyway for his murder.

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Cases: an abandoned baby; a teenager on drugs.

programme.title: Alfred Hitchcock Presents
programme.desc: "A bookkeeper decides to come out of anonymity by committing a crime."

programme.title: Alfred Hitchcock Presents
programme.desc: When a woman finds a bomb in her car, it convinces her that her husband loves her.

programme.title: Mannix
programme.desc: Mannix is told a murder of a woman he recently witnessed happened a year before. The sheriff insists that maybe the gumshoe is suffering hallucinations. Joe is befuddled until the victim's sister hires him to investigate.

programme.title: Cannon
programme.desc: A dead man hires Cannon! The man's will requires than an investigator look into his death, so Christopher Grant hires Cannon to see if any of the man's scheming relatives might have helped him to an early exit.

programme.title: Barnaby Jones
programme.desc: A lawyer plans to botch the defense of a murder suspect in order to protect the real killer - his own son.

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Martin Luther King's assassination sends Friday and the Emergency Control Center into action.

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: The detectives crack down on wildcatters—freelance tow-truck drivers who victimize motorists.

programme.title: Adam-12
programme.desc: Malloy has his eye on an attractive woman he's seeing all over town walking a scotty dog, which eventually turns out to be bad news for her. Meanwhile, he and Reed assist a police helicopter track down a young man riding his dirt bike in the hills illegally during fire season, search for an armed suspect who held up a movie theater before escaping on a motorcycle and coordinate with the police helicopter in a futile search for two armed robbery suspects who fatally shot a night watchman inside a department store.

programme.title: Adam-12
programme.desc: Malloy and Reed have to break the news to a young model that her press agent lied when he said there would be nothing wrong with having a nude photo shoot on a busy public beach. Later, they discover a man stealing from a phone booth, assist in the chase of a stolen dune buggy, try help an attractive woman whose safety is put in grave danger by an obscene phone caller, deal with a wino who dies while eating at a diner and pull over a woman towing a large jack-o-lantern.

programme.title: Toon In With Me
programme.desc: "Bill and Toony visit New Mexico on the next stop of Toon in With Me's "Trekkin' All 50" tour of the United States."

programme.title: Leave It to Beaver
programme.desc: Eddie nominates Wally for class president but Wally has no interest in the position; that is until Ward gives him some encouragement. Wally quickly gets wrapped up in the election and his friends see a change in him—a change that prompts them to vote against him.

programme.title: Leave It to Beaver
programme.desc: An old acquaintance of Ward's stops by and offers to paint the trim on the house. However, June and Ward are both apprehensive about the prospect of an alcoholic coming in contact with Wally and Beaver, despite the fact that he says he's cleaned himself up.

programme.title: Perry Mason
programme.sub-title: The Case Of The Final Fadeout
programme.desc: After an unscrupulous television star decides not to continue with his hit show, the producer is in hot water. It's not surprising that a murder soon occurs, but nothing goes as expected after that.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: Michelle is taken hostage by Ned Billings, who blames Matlock for his brother's suicide after being convicted of murder, thanks to Matlock. Tyler and Julie end up as Ned's hostages, too, and the three try to use tactics they've seen Matlock use in courtrooms and interrogations to help them stay alive.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: Virgil defends Parker after he is falsely accused of police brutality by a drug dealer. The prosecution's main witness - the man's girlfriend, who was once engaged to Parker.

programme.title: The Waltons
programme.desc: Curtis Willard's sister left her husband to pursue a singing career.

programme.title: Gunsmoke
programme.desc: Outlaws threaten to kill one person every day until Matt gets out of town.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: When a banker discriminates against midget George Marshall by denying him a job, Marshall, desperate to support his infant daughter, decides to rob the bank.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: When Mark finds gold on their property, a fast-talking salesman who tried to sell Lucas a new lightning rod offers instead to buy the ranch's mineral rights.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: When Micah is badly injured by an escaping prisoner, Lucas tracks the prisoner back to his home town.

programme.title: Wagon Train
programme.desc: When an esteemed member of the wagon train is found dead, Adams needs to prevent mob rule and make sure a lawful trial takes place. The accused is not well liked and found passed out with the rifle used in the murder. But is he the killer?

programme.title: Emergency!
programme.desc: John falls for a stewardess and shows his stuff when a passenger has a heart attack; later, he tries to date her. The firefighters respond to a motorcycle accident and a chemical fire.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: Trapper and Hawkeye seek to keep a new nurse from being transferred by Hot Lips, and they vie for her affection. Henry Blake, challenged by another commander to a boxing tournament, makes Trapper fight a big, intimidating soldier in exchange for keeping the nurse at the 4077th.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: Frank Burns complains about Hawkeye Pierce's disrespect, and when Henry appoints Hawkeye chief surgeon, it's to Burns' shock. The rest of the 4077th "coronates" Hawk while Frank and Hot Lips complain to General Barker.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: Sergeant Baker arrives at the camp with his "moose." Hawkeye decides to find a way of getting her away from Baker. He tries ordering him to release her, tries buying her and then resorts to cheating at cards. He releases her but she won't go, so he tries to teach her how to be independent.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: The 4077th is designated as the setting for the making of an army film on Mobile Army Surgical Hospital units. Hawkeye is chosen as the star while Margaret and Frank compose a screenplay. Hawkeye objects to the piece of propaganda that filmmaker Lt. Bricker is producing and, having exposed the original film, reshoots a new one his way.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Mayor Pike (Dick Elliott) and the townspeople are shocked to discover that the last living descendant of Revolutionary War hero Nathan Tibbs is Mayberry's town drunk, Otis Campbell.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: A by-the-book courthouse inspector condemns Andy and Barney's lack of proper procedure.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Granny is feuding with the Beverly Hills Smog Commission because they tell her she has to stop making her lye soap. Commissioner Tinsley visits the mansion, ordering Granny to quit her soap making, and when she sees him, she threatens him with her shotgun. Jed and Granny visit Drysdale’s office for some help, where Jane tells them they should try to defeat Tinsley on Election Day, and Jed mistakes this as being told he should run.

programme.title: The Honeymooners
programme.desc: Ed handcuffs himself to Ralph on their way to the Raccoon convention.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: Hogan and his men volunteer for a German suicide squad train bound for the Russian front in order to steal key documents.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: Hogan and his men plan to destroy a gasoline station that has just been built in camp.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: An old woman in an isolated farmhouse is troubled by the appearance of tiny aliens.

programme.title: Perry Mason
programme.sub-title: The Case Of The Greek Goddess
programme.desc: Mason is hired by a sculptor charged with murdering the overbearing mother of his model.

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Friday grapples with the Uncle Tom syndrome in selling ethnic groups on police careers.

programme.title: Alfred Hitchcock Presents
programme.desc: A man believes that his sister murdered his wife.

programme.title: Alfred Hitchcock Presents
programme.desc: "Three women have been strangled. Police arrest a stocking salesman as the killer. Mr. Morgan knows who the real culprit is: he has seen the next murder in a dream. He tries to tell people, but no one listens. His wife ignores him as well, which is unfortunate because she is the strangler's next victim."

programme.title: Mannix
programme.desc: An investigation leads Joe Mannix to his hometown, Summer Grove, where he works on a murder case involving the death of a worker during a labor dispute.

programme.title: Cannon
programme.desc: A man hires Cannon to find out who is using trained dogs to kill the man he served with in Vietnam, and why. It might have something to do with the unit's commanding officer, permanently disabled, perhaps by his own men.

programme.title: Barnaby Jones
programme.desc: The manager of a jewelry-store steals a fortune in order to get a ransom for his kidnapped wife.

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Friday's apartment party provides insight into the nature of an officer's private life.

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: The detectives tackle cases for the department's robbery division.

programme.title: Adam-12
programme.desc: Today's patrol begins with a traffic stop of a high-society cat burglar who's just finished serving a four-year prison term, and Malloy senses the guy is about to return to his old ways. Meanwhile, he and Reed engage in a standoff with a wounded robbery suspect who fatally shot a convenience store worker, examine an abandoned vehicle, investigate the theft of a book from a library and deal with a distraught unemployed man who takes his young daughter hostage in his home.

programme.title: Adam-12
programme.desc: Malloy returns from vacation sporting a mustache, but finds it difficult getting his colleagues to accept his new look. On patrol, he and Reed respond to a small plane crash by a drunkard that critically injures his young son, investigate the theft of valuable stamps from a mansion, search for a jewelry store armed robber with the aid of a talented witness, deal with a very unlucky purse snatcher and interrogate an evasive department store shoplifter with a big surprise in her purse.

programme.title: Toon In With Me
programme.desc: "Ship ahoy! Bill and Toony enjoy a luxury cruise, waterslides and all."

programme.title: Leave It to Beaver
programme.desc: Both Beaver and Larry are forced into attending dancing school by their parents and after one lesson, they find that they absolutely detest it, like they knew they would. This prompts them to skip class next time and they hide out behind a barn until it's time to go home.

programme.title: Leave It to Beaver
programme.desc: Larry is furious when Beaver leaves him out when he joins a club called the Bloody Five. To get revenge, Larry makes up a story that he is starting his own club and that people are waiting in line to join. This prompts Beaver to resign from the Bloody Five and he tries to join Larry's bogus club.

programme.title: Perry Mason
programme.sub-title: The Case Of The Restless Redhead
programme.desc: A woman claims she was menaced by a car driven by a hooded assailant, whom she shot at with a revolver. When the police find a body in a car wreck with a bullet wound, she is wanted for murder.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: Matlock vies with a formidable district attorney while defending a client accused of killing a city councilwoman, discovering a secret hiding in the man's past that is affecting his judgment in the case.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: Maybelle's new phone sex business is a great success - until one her girls decides to moonlight as a prostitute.

programme.title: The Waltons
programme.desc: Grandma is in the hospital and Grandpa wants to bring her home

programme.title: Gunsmoke
programme.desc: A pair of drifters plot to ambush a prospector who's on his way to Dodge after striking big.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: Ben is forced to confront a former gunnery officer.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: When an outlaw leader lures Marshal Torrance out of town, Lucas is the only one who can stop him from lynching a local man who killed one of the members of his gang.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A former army captain comes to North Fork to kill the man who shot down his son in a gunfight—Lucas McCain.

programme.title: Wagon Train
programme.desc: When the deceased's wife arrives, the people on the wagon train learn that the murdered man has a dark past, and this could be a case of Cain and Abel—or perhaps someone in the dead-man's past came home-to-roost.

programme.title: Emergency!
programme.desc: A fireman is injured in a practice drill. Roy and John think they have a buyer for the old fire engine. A man suffers a back injury while riding a motorcycle. A mother pressures Dr. Morton to give her son a prescription. A man having a heart attack walks into the station. DeSoto and Gage rescue a man who has fallen off a cliff on Catalina Island.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: When Henry goes for some R&R, Hawkeye pretends to crack up so that Frank will let him and Trapper go on some R&R.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: John Hodges, a chopper pilot referred to as The Cowboy, has been hit in the shoulder, and arrives at the 4077th. He is expecting a letter—he's worried that his wife, Jean, is leaving him for another man. He wants to go home, but Henry refuses, stating Cowboy's wound isn't serious enough to merit a stateside ticket. Bad luck then follows Henry Blake like the seat of his pants!

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: When Col. Henry Blake is transferred to Tokyo and Frank starts imposing military discipline on the camp, the surgeons will do anything to get Henry back.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: A rash of thefts breaks out in the camp. Missing pieces include Frank's silver picture frame, Margaret's hair brush and Trapper's watch. The camp is searched and everything is found in Hawkeye's locker.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Ellie encourages and helps a female farmhand to express her femininity.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Grumpy businessman Ben Weaver insists that Andy foreclose on a down-on-his-luck neighbor.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: A doctor blows the whistle on Granny's mountain-medicine practice.

programme.title: The Honeymooners
programme.desc: Norton invests in Ralph's stock when Ralph wants twenty dollars. When Ralph thinks he is named in a millionaire's will, arguments arise. It turns out Ralph was simply left a pet bird named Fortune, and much of the money was left to the butler and maid.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: Hogan kidnaps Burkhalter's sister in order to exchange her for a captured Allied agent.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: Klink is to be executed when the Gestapo finds him with information Hogan planted on him to deliver to the underground.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Gaining telepathic abilities when his coin lands on its edge, a mild-mannered bank clerk learns about the difference between other people's plans and fantasies.

programme.title: Perry Mason
programme.sub-title: The Case Of The Skeleton's Closet
programme.desc: Mason defends the ex-wife of an author who is murdered after having written a lurid expose´ on small town secrets.

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Martin Luther King's assassination sends Friday and the Emergency Control Center into action.

programme.title: Alfred Hitchcock Presents
programme.desc: A woman learns that a winning sweepstakes ticket is in the suit her husband was buried in.

programme.title: Alfred Hitchcock Presents
programme.desc: A man murders his lover's husband to have her for himself.

programme.title: Mannix
programme.desc: After inheriting the original manuscript of the first chapter of Marx's "The Capital," Lisa Ralph turns up murdered.

programme.title: Cannon
programme.desc: A mob killer murders Cannon's client. But the killer is someone Cannon will never suspect, and that leaves him unprepared when he is accused of the crime.

programme.title: Barnaby Jones
programme.desc: Barnaby believes that a parolee who served time for hit-and-run charges is connected to a year-old robbery case.

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Police and Secret Service undertake maximum security for a Presidential visit to Los Angeles.

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Friday clashes with a woman writer gathering research material for an article on policewomen.

programme.title: Adam-12
programme.desc: While assisting in a tactics training course, Malloy and Reed meet Officer Wells' new partner, an overconfident probationary officer who seems destined to put himself and his colleagues in danger. On patrol, they deal with an unconventional bank robber, come to the aid of a motor officer who is injured during a traffic stop and investigate a credible bomb threat at a grocery store.

programme.title: Adam-12
programme.desc: The captain has ordered top priority be given to ending a rash of burglaries in the area, and all signs point to career criminal Reno West. Meanwhile, Malloy and Reed use their creativity to neutralize a vicious guard dog at the home of an unresponsive diabetic man, investigate the theft of a jade figurine from a mansion and respond to a domestic dispute.

programme.title: Toon In With Me
programme.desc: "Bill trains to be a private detective, with a little help from TV history and a real-life private eye!"

programme.title: Leave It to Beaver
programme.desc: Wally lends his school sweater to Frances and quickly finds getting it back is going to be difficult because the girl keeps making up excuses. Things reach a boiling point when Ward and June overhear Frances bragging to her friends how Wally is chasing after her.

programme.title: Leave It to Beaver
programme.desc: After seeing someone being hypnotized in a movie, Beaver sets out to do the same. He tries hypnotism on Eddie—who pretends Beaver has hypnotized him—and Beaver gets scared when Eddie won't snap out of the trance.

programme.title: Perry Mason
programme.sub-title: The Case Of The Sleepwalker's Niece
programme.desc: When his stepbrother is found dead, a man is charged with murder and is accused of using his sleepwalking as a cover-up.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: A private investigator's daughter shoots some photos that get the wrong man accused of murder.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: Forbes is delighted when his fiancée Angela comes to see him, but is disappointed when he realizes that they have very different plans for the future.

programme.title: The Waltons
programme.desc: A Baldwin relative visits and John-Boy wants to interview her about events in Europe

programme.title: Gunsmoke
programme.desc: A wounded outlaw jeopardizes Cody Durham's courtship with Rose Loring.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: Candy faces unexpected troubles when he's left a great deal of money by an old friend.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A new store owner upsets the town by demanding that all credit accounts be paid off.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: The widow of a bandit killed by Lucas plots a grotesque revenge.

programme.title: Wagon Train
programme.desc: Countess Baranof is desperate to get to Alaska to claim her family fortune, and with no horses she applies her considerable charms on Flint. But she's not the one Flint should worry about, as her bodyguard has a more sinister agenda.

programme.title: Emergency!
programme.desc: Roy and John become candidates for a welfare committee. A man gets his arm stuck in an appliance drain while his brother aspirates on a can tab. A delirious child causes problems at the hospital. A sculptress’ model is stuck inside a plaster cast. A construction worker is trapped on a crane.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: Hawkeye moves a wounded North Korean soldier into The Swamp, rather than let him be shipped out before he's stable. During the night he and Trapper play Dracula, and siphon off a pint of Frank's blood. The soldier then contracts hepatitis, so they have to test Frank without him knowing, and have to keep him away from Margaret and the patients.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: Hawkeye writes home, describing Christmas in Korea: Radar ships a jeep home, a piece at a time; Henry gives the monthly lecture on sex, with the aid of figure A and figure B; Trapper helps deliver a calf; Klinger and Frank get into a fight, but Father Mulcahy smoothes things over; Hawkeye and Trapper sabotage Margaret's tent; Hawkeye flies to the front line dressed as Santa to help a wounded soldier.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: The nurses go to extreme lengths to find a date for Nurse Eddie—they won't go out with anyone until Eddie gets a date. The men draw straws, and Hawkeye is the big loser, especially after Eddie nearly kills him in a scene resembling teenage "mating" rituals.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: Radar gets a Dear John recording from home. Hawkeye and Trapper try to set him up with a date, but fail. Radar is taken by a new nurse at the camp and she is into poetry and music, so they coach him. Margaret wants to stop the relationship, so Hawkeye and Trapper get between her and Frank until she relents. Radar's "Ahhhh, Bach!" and "That's highly significant" quotes win him the girl.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Barney is suspicious of Mayberry's mysterious new farmer (William Schallert).

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: An escaped convict vows revenge on the man who sent him back to prison: none other than Deputy Barney Fife.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jed, who took a job as a garbage man to do something to keep busy, gets a job at the O.K. Oil Company on the Board of Directors after Drysdale talks him into it. He decides to help the company get more oil and money. The clan brings oil from their backyard to donate more oil, and to make some profit for O.K. Oil, they start an airline with the O.K. plane, complete with Jethro as the pilot.

programme.title: The Honeymooners
programme.desc: Ralph has an accident on his way to receiving his Safest Bus Driver Award.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: Hogan plans to get the blueprints for and interfere with the testing of a new weapon.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: Hogan plans to steal the picture that the Gestapo is using to blackmailing Klink.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A commercial aircraft mysteriously travels back through time.

programme.title: Perry Mason
programme.sub-title: The Case Of The Potted Planter
programme.desc: A jealous husband is teased into a tizzy after being led on by his sister's lies.

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: The detectives crack down on wildcatters—freelance tow-truck drivers who victimize motorists.

programme.title: Alfred Hitchcock Presents
programme.desc: A man's belief in a faith healer leads to an interesting situation for both of them.

programme.title: Alfred Hitchcock Presents
programme.desc: "A bank teller schemes the perfect plan."

programme.title: Mannix
programme.desc: Mannix receives a visit from Jane Haley after her alcoholic brother disappears without a trace.

programme.title: Cannon
programme.desc: Cannon tries to extract reporter Peggy Angel from a clever frame. Who is the real murderer, and why frame this particular person?

programme.title: Barnaby Jones
programme.desc: Betty searches for a couple's missing son, unaware that he's a psycho and escaped from a mental hospital.

programme.title: Petticoat Junction
programme.sub-title: The Sneaky Ways Of A Woman Who Is Both Beautiful And Smart
programme.desc: Dr. Janet Craig, rebuffed as a physician by the local males, sets out to win them over as a woman—and a good cook.
